name: ✨ Pearls of Wisdom
description: A finely curated collection of the wonderful web we weave with a weekly roundup of bits and pieces from the far corners of the super information highway ✨

name: 🎉 Newest / Latest
description: Hand-picked and carefully curated content in a consumed collection of noteworthy articles that may shed some light on the future.

name: 👁️ A Closer Look
description: A weekly essay from a bucket of topics consisting of all things blockchain, artificial intelligence, extended reality, quantum computing, renewable energy, and regenerative practices.

name: 📣 Ask Me Anything
description: Every week I answer the most provocative **Ask Me Anything** and will utilize my Large Life Experience-Model (known to most as an LL-EM) to provide answers that wouldn't otherwise be found. The results are posted below.

name: 📺 Time Well Spent
description: The week's top ten must-watch YouTube videos that is Time Well Spent, curated to save you time and deliver the Alph-alpha™️

name: 🚨 OP-ED
description:
Debating ideas is a valuable mental exercise central to dialectic. However, without strong opinions, you might frequently shift between perspectives, avoiding commitment to any particular solution or advocacy for it. 

"If you don't stand for something, you'll fall for anything."

name: Dear ______ Letters
description: Critical thoughts from me to you <3

name: XR (Pirate Talk)
description: XR, MR, VR, and AR!!! The Future According to Pirates
